summary: Iteration 82 - Backend testing for Day Openings (Ouverture de Journée) feature. All 21 day_openings tests pass (6 original + 15 new edge cases). Regression tests on caisse (17), day_closure (7), and billettage (11) all pass. Total: 56 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Day Openings feature is fully functional with all endpoints working correctly
POST /api/day-openings/{date}/open is idempotent (returns already_open on re-call)
POST /api/day-openings/{date}/open with force=True bypasses previous day closure check
POST /api/invoices returns 423 LOCKED when day is not opened
POST /api/caisse/tables returns 423 LOCKED when day is not opened
GET /api/day-openings/history/list returns history with closure info
conftest.py fixture correctly opens day for all tests with force=True

success_rate.backend: 100% (56 tests passed: 21 day_openings + 17 caisse + 7 day_closure + 11 billettage)

seed_data_creation: Test invoices and tables created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 confirmed Day Openings feature is fully functional. Key behaviors tested: (1) GET status returns open/closed/not_opened, (2) POST open is idempotent, (3) force=True bypasses previous day check, (4) 423 LOCKED returned for invoice/table creation when day not opened, (5) day_closures close/reopen hooks correctly update day_openings status, (6) history endpoint includes closure info. All 21 day_openings tests pass. Regression tests on caisse, day_closure, and billettage all pass (56 total tests).
features_tested: POST /api/day-openings/{date}/open - open day with optional initial_cash and notes
POST /api/day-openings/{date}/open - force=True bypasses previous day check
POST /api/invoices - 423 LOCKED when day not opened
POST /api/caisse/tables - 423 LOCKED when day not opened
POST /api/day-closures/{date}/close - hook marks day_openings as closed
POST /api/day-closures/{date}/reopen - hook marks day_openings as open
